description_long: This object is a cylindrical metal can with a slightly weathered and rusted appearance, featuring a turquoise-blue label that is partially faded and pixelated. The label wraps around the can and includes a prominent 'HEINZ BEANZ' logo on one side, along with some nutritional information and small icons in yellow and green. The top of the can is sealed with a metallic lid, showing concentric circular ridges typical of canned goods. The surface of the can is slightly dented and shows signs of wear, suggesting it has been exposed to the elements or handled frequently. The can is of a size commonly used for food storage, such as beans or soup, and is likely made primarily of tin-plated steel.
description: A weathered, turquoise-labeled metal can with a 'HEINZ BEANZ' logo and a sealed metallic lid, showing signs of rust and wear.
description_view_0: The can's side shows faded turquoise labeling with some nutritional information and barcode details visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights more of the label's text and icons, with the logo partially visible on the left edge.
description_view_2: The front displays the 'HEINZ BEANZ' logo prominently, along with a green icon and part of the product image.
description_view_3: The can's side is mostly turquoise with significant fading and rust, and only the edge of the logo is visible.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: HEINZ BEANZ logo, nutritional information, barcode, icons
